products.name: Licorice Twists
products.description: Classic salty licorice twists, soft and chewy with a rich, slightly tangy flavor. Each twist is crafter to provide the perfect balance of traditional licorice taste and a gentle hint of saltiness. Perfect for those who enjoy nostalgic, old-fashioned sweets with a bold character. Ideal for a small treat or sharing with friends!

products.name: Licorice Drops
products.description: Classic licorice drops, soft and chewy with a rich, slightly sweet flavor. Each piece is crafted to deliver the timeless taste of traditional licorice, perfect for a nostalgic treat or sharing with friends. Ideal for those who love authentic old-fashioned sweets.

products.name: Filled Licorice Sticks
products.description: Salted licorice sticks with a sweet raspberry filling, soft and chewy with a rich, nostalgic flavor. Each stick blends the bold taste of traditional licorice with a fruity center for a simple, old-fashioned indulgence.

products.name: Berry Bites
products.description: Soft raspberry gummies with a delicate fruity flavor, chewy and sweet with a nostalgic taste. Each piece delivers the classic berry goodness that brings back memories of old-fashioned sweets.

products.name: Berry Bites
products.description: Chewy blackberry gummies, rich in flavor and soft in texture. Each gummy captures the classic taste of ripe berries, reminiscent of timeless retro candy.

products.name: Berry Bites
products.description: Sweet strawberry gummies, soft and chewy with a gentle fruity flavor. Each piece offers the nostalgic charm of traditional berry sweets, crafted for a simple indulgence.

products.name: Twisties
products.description: Sweet strawberry lollipop with a chewy, flavorful center. Each piece delivers the classic taste of traditional fruit candy, perfect for enjoying a nostalgic candy moment.

products.name: Twisties
products.description: Large blueberry lollipop, sweet and juicy with a soft, chewy center. Each lollipop captures the nostalgic taste of classic fruit candy, crafted for a timeless retro treat.

products.name: Twisties
products.description: Zesty orange lollipop, soft and chewy with a bright, fruity flavor. Each lollipop offers the retro charm of old-fashioned fruit sweets.

products.name: Choco Bar
products.description: Milk chocolate bar with a rich caramel filling, soft and indulgent. Each bite delivers the classic taste of traditional chocolate and gooey caramel, perfect for a nostalgic candy treat.

products.name: Choco Bar
products.description: Milk chocolate bar with a smooth mint cream filling, soft and flavorful. Each piece combines the classic chocolate taste with a refreshing hint of mint, crafted for a timeless retro experience.

products.name: Choco Bar
products.description: Milk chocolate bar with a creamy nougat filling, soft and satisfying. Each bar captures the classic flavor of traditional chocolate and nougat, reminiscent of old-fashioned candy.
